jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at PolicyBazaar
jsonLd.description:
Join the PolicyBazaar family as a Frontend Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PolicyBazaar:
PolicyBazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar!
